title: TIM - Process Indicators Against Business Partners URL List
content:
This playbook processes indicators to check if they exist in a Cortex XSOAR list containing business partner urls, and tags the indicators accordingly. To enable the playbook, provide a Cortex XSOAR list name containing business partner urls.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (TIM_Processing, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Threat Intelligence Management.

Inputs — BusinessPartnersUrlListName: A Cortex XSOAR list containing business partner url values. Url Indicators that appear in the list are tagged as business partners..

Outputs — BusinessPartnerUrl: URLs that are found in the business partner url list.; NotBusinessPartnerUrl: URLs that are not found in the business partner url list..

Integrations/scripts used: FilterByList, SetAndHandleEmpty.
